top_signals.title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 4 2026
top_signals.summary: The DCE iron ore futures trended weaker today. The most-traded contract I2609 closed at 767 yuan/mt, down 1.85% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices fell 6-11 yuan/mt from the previous day. Traders showed limited enthusiasm in offering; steel mills made few inquiries; overall spot market transactions were mediocre as of now.
